seed_instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 14 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
instruction: Design a 7-day road trip itinerary across the US West Coast. Include major cities, national parks, and activities for each day, along with estimated driving distances. The response must contain exactly 14 sentences. The response must contain at least 21 sentences.
response: This 7-day road trip begins in the vibrant city of San Francisco, where you can explore the iconic Golden Gate Bridge. On day two, drive north to Yosemite National Park to witness towering granite cliffs and ancient sequoia trees. You will spend the afternoon hiking through the valley before heading toward the Sierra Nevada mountains. Day three involves a scenic drive toward Lake Tahoe for some refreshing water activities and mountain views. On day four, you will travel across the desert landscape to reach the majestic Bryce Canyon National Park. You can spend your evening watching the sunset over the unique hoodoos and red rock formations. Day five takes you to Zion National Park, where you can hike the famous narrow slot canyons. After exploring the park, you will drive toward the bustling city of Las Vegas for a night of entertainment. Day six features a drive toward the Grand Canyon to witness the vast geological wonders of the Southwest. You will spend the day exploring the South Rim and taking in the breathtaking vistas. On day seven, you will drive toward Los Angeles to conclude your coastal adventure. You can finish your trip by walking along the Santa Monica Pier and enjoying the Pacific breeze. This itinerary covers over 1,500 miles of diverse scenery and unforgettable landmarks. You will experience the best of the American West in one incredible week. Each stop offers a unique blend of natural beauty and urban excitement. This journey is perfect for those seeking adventure and scenic photography opportunities. Please ensure you book your accommodations and park passes well in advance. Safe travels on your magnificent West Coast expedition!<turn|>

Each stop offers a unique blend of natural beauty and urban excitement. This journey is perfect for those seeking adventure and scenic photography opportunities. Please ensure you book your accommodations and park passes well in advance. Safe travels on your magnificent West Coast expedition!
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The Model Response does not acknowledge the conflicting constraints in the Instruction. Specifically, the Instruction requires the response to contain exactly 14 sentences and at least 21 sentences, which is inherently contradictory. The Model Response provides an itinerary without addressing or resolving this conflict, nor does it ask for clarification.  

**Answer**: 1
